title: cremaspora triflora
intro: Cremaspora triflora, a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, is a tropical plant native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimalarial and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant's health benefits include its potential to alleviate symptoms of malaria, reduce fever, and soothe digestive problems, among others. Cremaspora triflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional medicine as a tincture or raw herb.
